message:
refactor: Consolidate version helpers and reduce code duplication

Moves duplicated version extraction logic to shared helpers:

commands/mod.rs:
- Remove inline version parsing, use helpers::extract_version_numbers
- Net reduction of ~60 lines

commands/helpers.rs:
- Add 10 lines for additional utility functions

hook.rs:
- Simplify version comparison using shared helpers
- Remove duplicated extraction logic

tui/widgets.rs:
- Minor updates to use shared utilities

This consolidation ensures consistent version parsing behavior
across all RCH subsystems and reduces maintenance burden.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
